name: Senolytics registry-surveillance breadth follow-up repair
summary: Records a bounded follow-up attempt for the senolytics registry-surveillance gap. ClinicalTrials.gov importer previews for NCT03430037, NCT03675724, NCT06133634, and NCT04685590 failed with DNS resolution errors before source snapshots could be retained, so no no-results registry records were added and the gap remains open.

scope.question: Repair the senolytics active-trials registry breadth gap by running source-snapshot-backed ClinicalTrials.gov surveillance for deferred fisetin frailty, D+Q, fisetin, senolytics, and senescence-targeting registry terms when retrieval is available.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks the bounded follow-up repair attempt and preserves required review lanes without promoting the candidate.
Updates the active-trials registry gap with the 2026-06-29 ClinicalTrials.gov importer failures and keeps the no-results registry gap open until retained source snapshots support closure.

promotion.summary: Promoted to accepted after all required active review lanes passed.
